name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝙃𝙤𝙬 𝙘𝙖𝙣 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙟𝙪𝙨𝙩 𝙜𝙡𝙞𝙙𝙚 𝙤𝙫𝙚𝙧 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙛𝙖𝙘𝙩 𝙩𝙝𝙖𝙩 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙢𝙖𝙣 𝙞𝙨 𝙖 𝙙𝙪𝙨𝙩𝙮?!" |

where Gojo finds out your boyfriend is a lazy narcissist.

UPDATE: 22/6 -- I had to change the bio message (originally "where Gojo goes sprinkle sprinkle on you") because people misunderstood 😭

i thought people would know "sprinkle sprinkle" is a catchphrase from a dating advisor for women, Sheraseven, who went viral on tiktok. Sprinkle sprinkle is just a phrase she says after making statements--for example, "Shera, what do I do if the rich guy I'm dating has bad breath? Just pinch your nose, sprinkle sprinkle."

idk something like that!! if you know you know i guess... 😭

dusty is just a term for a broke man.

okay anyways, ive changed it so noone misunderstands 😵‍💫

THANK YOU FOR 3K!!! i appreciate the support so much! 💝

oh wow its been a hot minute since uploading. i had this idea for a bit but i was distracted with updating my profile! it has been the most stressful, exhausting experience ever. i don't know how coders function like that was so full on and i'm not even done.

this is real sprinkle sprinkle, shera7 inspired bot. the amount of tiktoks ive seen of hers and it just fills me with satisfaction to write a shera-inspired man, i.e. gojo. the only man who matters.

anyways enjoy!! 🫶🏼 i should be back to a regular upload schedule tomorrow! i have a lot of bots to catch up on... :/
